requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — MS/IEC 62133

summary.en: Mauritius does not write its own battery safety test method; the Mauritius Standards Bureau （MSB） adopts international standards as MS standards, and IEC 62133 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries） is the internationally recognised reference for portable lithium cell and pack safety. Where lithium batteries or power banks fall within an MSB-regulated or import-inspected category, conformity is demonstrated against the adopted MS/IEC 62133 requirements, typically through test reports from an accredited laboratory. The standard covers abuse testing such as overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, and forced discharge. Exporters should confirm with MSB which edition is currently adopted and whether IEC/CB-scheme reports are accepted.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯不自行编写电池安全测试方法；毛里求斯标准局（MSB）将国际标准采纳为MS标准，而IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）是便携式锂电芯及电池组安全的国际公认参照。当锂电池或移动电源属于MSB受监管或进口受检类别时，须依据所采纳的MS/IEC 62133要求证明合格评定，通常通过认可实验室的测试报告。该标准涵盖过充、外部短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及强制放电等滥用测试。出口商应向MSB确认当前采纳的版本，以及是否接受IEC/CB体系报告。
summary.zht: 模里西斯不自行編寫電池安全測試方法；模里西斯標準局（MSB）將國際標準採納為MS標準，而IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）是便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全的國際公認參照。當鋰電池或行動電源屬於MSB受監管或進口受檢類別時，須依據所採納的MS/IEC 62133要求證明合格評定，通常透過認可實驗室的測試報告。該標準涵蓋過充、外部短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及強制放電等濫用測試。出口商應向MSB確認當前採納的版本，以及是否接受IEC/CB體系報告。

standards_or_laws: MS/IEC 62133 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications （adopted by MSB from IEC 62133）
IEC 62133-2 — Lithium systems （international reference behind the adopted MS standard）
Mauritius Standards Bureau Act — MSB mandate to adopt MS standards and operate conformity assessment

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment）, with GB 18287 for mobile-phone batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 test report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory evidences Chinese domestic compliance but is not automatically equivalent to an MS/IEC 62133 report for MSB conformity; a CB-scheme/IEC 62133 report is generally more directly transferable.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机电池另有GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241测试报告证明中国国内合规，但不自动等同于用于MSB合格评定的MS/IEC 62133报告；CB体系／IEC 62133报告通常更易直接转用。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機電池另有GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241測試報告證明中國國內合規，但不自動等同於用於MSB合格評定的MS/IEC 62133報告；CB體系／IEC 62133報告通常更易直接轉用。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment （SAC/SAMR）
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones （SAC）

gap.en: Because Mauritius adopts IEC 62133 as its MS reference rather than maintaining a national deviation, the cleanest route is an IEC 62133 / CB-scheme test report rather than a GB 31241 report. Key gaps: （1） GB 31241 deviates from IEC 62133 in crush and overcharge test severity, so a GB report does not automatically satisfy MS/IEC 62133; （2） exporters should obtain or convert to an IEC 62133-2 report from an accredited/CB laboratory; （3） confirm with MSB the current adopted edition and whether the product category is in an inspected scope at import.
gap.zh: 由于毛里求斯采纳IEC 62133作为其MS参照，而非维持国家偏差，最简捷路径是IEC 62133／CB体系测试报告而非GB 31241报告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241在挤压和过充测试严苛程度上偏离IEC 62133，故GB报告不自动满足MS/IEC 62133；（2）出口商应取得或转换为认可／CB实验室出具的IEC 62133-2报告；（3）向MSB确认当前采纳版本及该产品类别在进口时是否属于受检范围。
gap.zht: 由於模里西斯採納IEC 62133作為其MS參照，而非維持國家偏差，最簡捷路徑是IEC 62133／CB體系測試報告而非GB 31241報告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241在擠壓和過充測試嚴苛程度上偏離IEC 62133，故GB報告不自動滿足MS/IEC 62133；（2）出口商應取得或轉換為認可／CB實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2報告；（3）向MSB確認當前採納版本及該產品類別在進口時是否屬於受檢範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where the product category is MSB-regulated or import-inspected, conformity to the adopted MS/IEC 62133 is required; MSB adopts IEC 62133 rather than maintaining a national test deviation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: Mauritius Standards Bureau （MSB） — adoption of MS/IEC standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritius adopts IEC 62133 as its MS reference for portable lithium cell and battery safety. Where the product is in an MSB-regulated or import-inspected scope, an IEC 62133 / CB-scheme report is the more directly transferable evidence. A Chinese GB 31241 report demonstrates engineering safety but, due to national test deviations, does not automatically satisfy MS/IEC 62133; confirm the adopted edition and accepted evidence with MSB.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里求斯采纳IEC 62133作为便携式锂电芯及电池安全的MS参照。当产品属于MSB受监管或进口受检范围时，IEC 62133／CB体系报告是更易直接转用的证据。中国GB 31241报告证明工程安全，但因国家测试偏差，不自动满足MS/IEC 62133；请向MSB确认采纳版本及可接受证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 模里西斯採納IEC 62133作為便攜式鋰電芯及電池安全的MS參照。當產品屬於MSB受監管或進口受檢範圍時，IEC 62133／CB體系報告是更易直接轉用的證據。中國GB 31241報告證明工程安全，但因國家測試偏差，不自動滿足MS/IEC 62133；請向MSB確認採納版本及可接受證據。
